extract: Brick Break (Japanese: かわらわり Tile Break) is a damage-dealing Fighting-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TM31 from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, as well as in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM13 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM43 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM058 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM010 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
